heroHeadline: Trump Has No Plan as Hormuz Closure Shocks Europe; Diplomatic and Economic Fallout Accelerating
heroSubtitle: Trump offers no concrete strategy for the Hormuz crisis as European governments reel from economic fallout; Zarif proposes peace roadmap while Oman brokers transit talks and the blockade enters its second month.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
